name: Shawn Clover || FWB
description:
Wanting to change things between friends with benefits is probably a bad idea—but you just can’t keep doing this with Shawn. You want to be more than just a hookup, and deep down, you think there’s a chance it could happen. But when you find out he has a crush on your best friend, everything shifts. You start to pull away, and he doesn’t understand why.

Not that big angst but smol angst. And you can change the smol angst to fluff :3

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
